articles.title: GameStop Reports Narrower Quarterly Loss
articles.summary: GameStop reported a smaller quarterly loss than analysts expected, as cost-cutting measures partially offset declining store traffic.

articles.title: GameStop Announces Store Closures as Part of Restructuring
articles.summary: GameStop said it would close a number of underperforming stores as part of an ongoing turnaround effort.

articles.title: GameStop Executive Departs Amid Strategy Shift
articles.summary: A senior GameStop executive left the company as leadership continues to reassess the retailer's long-term strategy.

articles.title: GameStop Shares Spike on Heavy Retail Trading Volume
articles.summary: GameStop shares saw a sharp rise in volatility amid unusually heavy retail trading activity.

articles.title: GameStop Faces Shareholder Lawsuit Over Disclosures
articles.summary: GameStop was named in a shareholder lawsuit alleging inadequate disclosure of certain business risks.

articles.title: Analyst Downgrades GameStop on Turnaround Uncertainty
articles.summary: An analyst downgraded GameStop shares, citing continued uncertainty about the pace of the company's turnaround plan.
